title: Link layer frame format dataclasses
description:
Define Python dataclasses for link layer frames per spec section 4.

Classes:
- LLSecByte: flags for addressing mode, security level
- FrameHeader: length, llsec, seqnum, dst_addr
- Frame: header + payload + signature

Address modes:
- 0: implicit (broadcast)
- 1: short (2 bytes)
- 2: extended (8 bytes)

Methods:
- Frame.to_bytes() -> bytes
- Frame.from_bytes(data) -> Frame
- Frame.max_payload_size(addr_mode) -> int

Use @dataclass(frozen=True) for immutability where appropriate.
close_reason: Implemented link-layer frame dataclasses per spec section 4 in link/frame.py: LichenFrame (Length/LLSec/Epoch/SeqNum/DstAddr/Payload/MIC), AddrMode + MicLength enums, LLSec bit packing, to_bytes()/from_bytes() with validation. Tests: tests/link/test_frame.py (22 cases incl. hand-computed spec byte vectors, round-trips, and parse-error paths). Note: fw4 (Rust/C encoding) and muq (TX/RX integration) remain open.
